identity.mission: Create a neighborhood errand app that feels like a trusted local community, not a soulless tech giant.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix 'Swiss Utility' with 'Friendly Local Bakery' aesthetics.
Emotion First: Trust and Efficiency. Every pixel must feel safe and snappy.
Content is King: The errand details (Money, Item, Location) are the heroes.
Zoom In: Use large, legible type for critical numbers (Price, Distance).
Negative Space: Don't clutter. Let the map/list breathe.

primary.name: Neighborhood Emerald
primary.usage: Primary Buttons, Active States, Success Indicators

buttons.primary: rounded-full bg-emerald-600 px-8 py-3 text-white font-bold hover:bg-emerald-700 hover:-translate-y-0.5 transition-all shadow-lg shadow-emerald-600/20
buttons.secondary: rounded-full bg-white border border-slate-200 text-slate-900 px-8 py-3 hover:bg-slate-50 hover:border-slate-300 transition-all
buttons.ghost: rounded-lg text-slate-600 hover:text-emerald-600 hover:bg-emerald-50 px-4 py-2

cards.base: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-slate-100 shadow-sm hover:shadow-xl hover:shadow-slate-200/50 hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300

inputs.default: rounded-lg border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 px-4 py-3 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-emerald-500 focus:border-transparent transition-all placeholder:text-slate-400

badges.price: bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700 font-bold px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-sm border border-emerald-100
badges.status_open: bg-blue-50 text-blue-700 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-md text-xs font-semibold
badges.status_active: bg-amber-50 text-amber-700 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-md text-xs font-semibold

navigation.mobile_bottom: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-slate-200 p-4 flex justify-around items-center z-50
navigation.desktop_top: fixed top-0 w-full bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-slate-100 z-50

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text is slate-900 on white, or white on emerald-600.
accessibility.aria_labels: All icon-only buttons must have aria-label.

donts: No generic 'Lorem Ipsum' - use realistic errand data.
No centered text blocks longer than 3 lines.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'Manrope' from Google Fonts via import in index.css.
Implement the 'Post Errand' flow as a multi-step wizard, not a giant form.
Dashboard should look like a lively feed of opportunities.
Chat should feel like iMessage or WhatsApp - clean bubbles, distinct colors.
Use the 'Bento' grid logic for the 'How it Works' section on the landing page.
